description: Market-to-signal source mappings. Agents read this to know which data sources are relevant to each market. Weights are initial estimates from research -- agents may adjust based on context.

KXCLOSEHORMUZ.name: Strait of Hormuz Closure
KXCLOSEHORMUZ.description: Will Iran close the Strait of Hormuz to oil tanker traffic?

ooni.rationale: Internet censorship signals domestic crisis response. Shutdowns correlate with major regime actions including potential Strait closure operations.

cloudflare_radar.rationale: Network traffic anomalies complement OONI data. Internet disruption cluster indicates heightened security state that may precede Strait action.

eia.rationale: Oil supply disruption indicator. Weekly inventory draws and disruption signals can reflect market pricing in Hormuz risk or actual disruption.

usaspending.rationale: Military posture signal. CENTCOM/Arabian Gulf procurement surges indicate elevated US military readiness for potential Strait operations.

gdelt.rationale: Real-time global news volume and tone indicator. Article surge on Strait of Hormuz signals escalating media attention that precedes market-moving events.

KXUSAIRANAGREEMENT.name: US-Iran Nuclear Agreement
KXUSAIRANAGREEMENT.description: Will the US and Iran reach a new nuclear agreement?

usaspending.rationale: Diplomatic procurement patterns. Shifts in diplomatic spending and CENTCOM posture indicate negotiation trajectory or enforcement stance.

ofac.rationale: Sanctions movement is the most direct signal. Net additions = escalation (deal less likely), removals = de-escalation (deal momentum).

ooni.rationale: Internet censorship as instability proxy. High censorship correlates with regime under pressure, which affects deal calculus on both sides.

cloudflare_radar.rationale: Network anomalies complement OONI. Internet disruption signals domestic instability that may derail or accelerate deal negotiations.

bonbast.rationale: Rial exchange rate as pressure gauge. Rial collapse increases regime incentive to deal; rial stability suggests reduced urgency.

tedpix.rationale: Tehran stock market confidence. Market surges suggest deal optimism; crashes suggest pessimism or capital flight from instability.

KXNEXTIRANLEADER.name: Next Iran Supreme Leader
KXNEXTIRANLEADER.description: Who will be Iran's next Supreme Leader?

bonbast.rationale: Rial collapse signals regime instability. Leadership transitions become more likely when economic pressure reaches crisis levels.

tedpix.rationale: Capital flight indicator. Sharp drops or sustained crashes signal loss of elite confidence, which can precipitate leadership change.

ooni.rationale: Internet shutdowns signal regime action under pressure. High censorship rates indicate internal crisis that may force leadership transition.

cloudflare_radar.rationale: Network disruptions complement OONI. Outages and anomalies indicate state of emergency conditions that correlate with succession events.

ofac.rationale: Sanctions pressure on the regime. Escalation increases internal pressure that can destabilize leadership; removals reduce pressure.

KXWTIW.name: WTI Crude Oil Price
KXWTIW.description: Will WTI crude oil exceed specified price threshold?

eia.rationale: Direct oil data. Weekly inventory, imports, exports, and SPR stocks directly drive WTI pricing. Largest weight for fundamental supply data.

ooni.rationale: Hormuz disruption proxy. Iran internet shutdowns can signal escalation toward actions affecting oil supply (e.g., Strait closure threats).

cloudflare_radar.rationale: Network anomalies as Iran crisis indicator. Outages signal instability that may affect oil markets via supply risk premium.

ofac.rationale: Sanctions enforcement on oil exports. Net additions = tighter enforcement on Iran/others (supply constraint, bullish). Removals = looser (bearish).

usaspending.rationale: Conflict duration indicator. Elevated military procurement for CENTCOM signals sustained Middle East operations that support higher oil prices.

gdelt.rationale: Real-time global news volume and tone indicator. Article surge on oil, OPEC, or crude signals escalating media attention that precedes market-moving events.

KXRECOGPERSONIRAN.name: US Recognition of Iranian Opposition Figure
KXRECOGPERSONIRAN.description: Will the US recognize a specific Iranian opposition figure or movement?

bonbast.rationale: Regime instability proxy. Rial collapse increases likelihood of US backing opposition as regime vulnerability creates policy opportunity.

tedpix.rationale: Elite confidence indicator. Market crashes signal capital flight and loss of regime backing, making US recognition more viable.

usaspending.rationale: Policy direction signal. Procurement patterns for diplomatic or democracy promotion spending indicate US strategic posture toward Iran.

ofac.rationale: Sanctions as policy indicator. Escalation suggests hardline approach (more likely to recognize opposition). De-escalation suggests engagement (less likely).

KXPAHLAVIVISITA.name: Pahlavi Visit to US
KXPAHLAVIVISITA.description: Will Reza Pahlavi visit the United States in an official capacity?

bonbast.rationale: Regime instability proxy. Rial collapse increases likelihood of US engagement with Pahlavi as regime vulnerability creates policy window.

tedpix.rationale: Elite confidence indicator. Market crashes signal loss of regime backing, making US outreach to Pahlavi more politically viable.

usaspending.rationale: Policy direction signal. Diplomatic and democracy promotion procurement patterns indicate US strategic posture toward Iranian opposition.

ofac.rationale: Sanctions as policy indicator. Escalation suggests hardline approach (more likely to engage Pahlavi). De-escalation suggests engagement with regime.

KXPAHLAVIHEAD.name: Pahlavi as Head of State
KXPAHLAVIHEAD.description: Will Reza Pahlavi become recognized as head of state of Iran?

bonbast.rationale: Regime instability proxy. Rial collapse to crisis levels is precondition for regime change scenario where Pahlavi recognition becomes plausible.

tedpix.rationale: Elite confidence indicator. Sustained market collapse signals capital flight and loss of regime backing, necessary for Pahlavi scenario.

usaspending.rationale: Policy direction signal. Procurement patterns for democracy promotion, diplomatic, or military operations indicate US readiness for regime change scenario.

ofac.rationale: Sanctions as policy indicator. Maximum pressure campaign (net additions) is precondition for regime collapse scenario enabling Pahlavi.

GHOST-RU.name: Russia Signal Group
GHOST-RU.description: Intelligence signals for Russian Federation events

ooni.rationale: Internet censorship signals authoritarian control response. Russia has history of censorship escalation during military operations, protests, and elections.

cloudflare_radar.rationale: Network traffic anomalies complement OONI data. Disruptions indicate heightened state control or infrastructure stress during military/political events.

ofac.rationale: US sanctions policy indicator. Net additions signal escalation (Ukraine, military operations). Removals unlikely but would indicate major policy shift.

eia.rationale: Energy export disruption proxy. Russia is major oil/gas producer. Global inventory changes reflect sanctions enforcement and export disruptions.

gdelt.rationale: Real-time global news volume and tone indicator. Article surge on Russia Ukraine war signals escalating media attention that precedes market-moving events.

entsog.rationale: Russia-to-EU gas flow indicator. Reduced eastward flows at key interconnection points (Mallnow/Yamal, Waidhaus/Nord Stream) signal Russian supply weaponization or sanctions impact.

ecb.rationale: EUR/RUB as sanctions pressure gauge. Ruble collapse signals sanctions impact or economic isolation.

comtrade.rationale: Russia trade flow data. Declining export volumes signal sanctions enforcement effectiveness. Monitor crude oil (2709) and natural gas (2711) commodity codes.

viirs.rationale: Satellite thermal anomaly detection. Elevated hotspot clusters near conflict zones indicate active military operations, industrial fires, or infrastructure strikes.

oryx.rationale: Visually confirmed military equipment losses. Loss rate trajectory indicates war intensity and resource depletion. Compare Russia vs Ukraine loss ratios for conflict balance.

GHOST-CN.name: China Signal Group
GHOST-CN.description: Intelligence signals for People's Republic of China events

ooni.rationale: Great Firewall operations indicator. Censorship escalation signals domestic crisis response, political events (Two Sessions, Party Congress), or external tensions (Taiwan).

cloudflare_radar.rationale: Network anomalies as infrastructure stress or state control signal. China has sophisticated censorship apparatus; traffic patterns reveal regime actions.

ofac.rationale: US-China relations indicator. Sanctions additions signal tech/military escalation. Pattern shifts indicate Taiwan posture, Xinjiang policy, or tech war evolution.

gdelt.rationale: Real-time global news volume and tone indicator. Article surge on China Taiwan signals escalating media attention that precedes market-moving events.

ecb.rationale: EUR/CNY as trade tension indicator. Yuan weakness signals capital outflows or economic pressure.

comtrade.rationale: China trade flow data. Import/export volumes reveal economic health and trade war impact. Monitor crude oil imports and total trade balance.

GHOST-VE.name: Venezuela Signal Group
GHOST-VE.description: Intelligence signals for Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela events

ooni.rationale: Internet censorship during political crises. Venezuela blocks social media and news sites during elections, protests, and regime pressure events.

cloudflare_radar.rationale: Network disruptions as regime instability indicator. Outages correlate with political crises, protests, and infrastructure decay from economic collapse.

ofac.rationale: US sanctions policy on Maduro regime. Additions = escalation (regime pressure), removals = de-escalation (negotiation signals, oil-for-relief deals).

eia.rationale: Oil production and export indicator. Venezuela has largest proven reserves; production collapse from sanctions/mismanagement affects global supply.

gdelt.rationale: Real-time global news volume and tone indicator. Article surge on Venezuela Maduro signals escalating media attention that precedes market-moving events.

comtrade.rationale: Venezuela trade flow data. Oil export volumes reflect sanctions impact and production collapse. Note: VE may not report; use partner-side data (CN imports from VE).

viirs.rationale: Satellite thermal monitoring. Gas flaring patterns indicate oil production activity. Declining flares signal production collapse.

dolarvzla.rationale: Parallel USD/VES exchange rate as regime pressure gauge. Divergence between oficial (BCV) and paralelo rates signals black market premium and economic crisis severity.

GHOST-EU.name: Europe Signal Group (Germany anchor)
GHOST-EU.description: Intelligence signals for European events, anchored on Germany as EU's largest economy

ooni.rationale: Democratic baseline for internet freedom. Germany censorship is low; deviations signal major events (terrorism, elections). Useful for Europe-wide comparison.

cloudflare_radar.rationale: Network health and cyber operations indicator. Germany is major internet hub; anomalies indicate cyber attacks, infrastructure issues, or cross-border events.

entsog.rationale: Physical gas flow data at EU interconnection points. Flow reductions signal supply disruptions, geopolitical pressure, or infrastructure issues affecting European energy security.

agsi.rationale: European gas storage levels. Fill percentage below 30% signals energy insecurity; above 80% signals resilience. Storage trajectory drives EU policy response and Russian leverage calculus.

ecb.rationale: EUR/USD exchange rate as EU economic health baseline. Euro weakness signals economic stress or policy divergence.

GHOST-US.name: United States Signal Group
GHOST-US.description: Intelligence signals for US domestic and foreign policy events

usaspending.rationale: Federal procurement as policy direction indicator. Contract patterns reveal priorities (defense, FEMA, homeland security, infrastructure) before public announcements.

eia.rationale: Domestic oil/gas data baseline. Inventory, SPR releases, exports reflect US energy policy, refinery operations, and supply security posture.

eia_grid.rationale: US electricity demand as economic activity indicator. Demand drops signal industrial slowdown or extreme weather events. Compare to seasonal norms for context.

GHOST-TR.name: Turkey Signal Group
GHOST-TR.description: Intelligence signals for Republic of Turkey events

ooni.rationale: High information control regime. Turkey blocks Twitter/social media during crises, elections, protests. Censorship escalation signals regime pressure or major events.

cloudflare_radar.rationale: Network disruptions as crisis indicator. Turkey has history of shutting down internet during coup attempts, Kurdish operations, and political transitions.

gdelt.rationale: Real-time global news volume and tone indicator. Article surge on Turkey Erdogan signals escalating media attention that precedes market-moving events.

ecb.rationale: EUR/TRY as Turkish economic instability indicator. Lira collapse signals economic crisis, inflation spiral, or policy failures.
